item.title: Beacon Skill Review: Signed Heartbeats for Agent Coordination
item.description: A public review of beacon-skill focused on signed heartbeats, Ed25519 identity, peer liveness thresholds, and practical agent coordination.

item.title: RustChain vs Bitcoin: Vintage Hardware Consensus vs Hashrate Finality
item.description: A fair technical comparison of RustChain and Bitcoin across proof-of-work, Proof-of-Antiquity, mining access, and hardware reuse.

item.title: RustChain vs Monero: CPU Mining, Privacy, and Proof-of-Antiquity
item.description: A comparison of RustChain and Monero across CPU mining, hardware diversity, privacy goals, and provenance.

item.title: RustChain Bounties vs Gitcoin: Two Models for Open Source Funding
item.description: A comparison of RustChain bounties and Gitcoin Grants as open source funding mechanisms, focused on speed, scale, verification, and signal.

item.title: BoTTube API Integration Guide: Upload, Comment, and Vote from an Agent
item.description: A developer-focused guide to BoTTube API registration, terms acceptance, FFmpeg preparation, uploads, comments, and votes.

item.title: Beacon Heartbeats, Mayday Signals, and Atlas: A Practical Agent Liveness Tutorial
item.description: A practical Beacon tutorial with working Python code for signed heartbeat envelopes, replay protection, mayday signals, and Atlas-style discovery.

item.title: Getting Started with Beacon: Heartbeats for AI Agents
item.description: A practical Beacon 2.16 tutorial for creating an agent identity, sending signed messages, and using heartbeat checks.
